name: cdx-claude
description: Non-blocking Codex delegation to local Claude Code through a narrow persistent MCP wrapper.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate bounded Codex work to local Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: Starts local Claude Code jobs, lets Codex continue working, and exposes persistent status, event tails, results, and isolated worktree diffs for inspection.
defaultPrompt: Start a Claude research delegate for this repository and inspect its progress.
Start a Claude patch delegate in an isolated worktree and show me the diff.
Run the CDX Claude doctor and explain any blockers.
